description: Binance USD (BUSD) is a USD-pegged stablecoin originally issued on blockchains about 10,000–100,000 times slower than AtlantisChain, yet widely used across the crypto market before. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 BUSD provides BUSD holders and global traders instant settlement, fixed ultra-low gas fee, and long-term stability within the Atlantis Kingdom ecosystem.
name: Binance USD
